case_title: SIMPSON MANUFACTURING COMPANY, INC. et al VS. NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY
REPLY MEMO IN SUPPORT OF DEFT NATIONAL UNION'S MTN TO STAY ACTION FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY OF PITTSBURGH, PA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS SIMPSON MANUFACTURING COMPANY, INC., SIMPSON STRONG-TIE COMPANY, INC. AND HONOLULU WOOD TREATING LLC'S CONDITIONAL JOINDER IN MOTION TO STAY ACTION - MOTION IS GRANTED, PER MONTROSE CHEM. CORP. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1993) 6 CAL.4TH 287. THE COURT IS NOT RULING ON THE NON-FORUM CONVENIENS GROUND. HOWEVER, AS TO THE FIREMAN'S FUND CROSS-COMPLAINT, IT IS STAYED NOT ON MONTROSE GROUNDS. IT IS STAYED UNDER THE COMITY PRINCIPLES DUE TO THE FACT THAT THE ISSUE IS CURRENTLY BEFORE JUDGE ARMSTRONG IN THE FEDERAL COURT AND WILL BE STAYED UNTIL JUDGE ARMSTRONG RULES AND THE THE PARTIES COULD COME BACK IN THIS COURT ONCE SHE RULES OR DOES NOT DECIDE THE MATTER. AS TO THE REMAINDER OF THE CASE, IT IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE UNDERLYING ACTION. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CHARLSTON, JEFFREY A. SUBSTITUTED FOR TURNER, KEITH A AS ATTORNEY FOR FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY

IT IS STAYED UNDER THE COMITY PRINCIPLES DUE TO THE FACT THAT THE ISSUE IS CURRENTLY BEFORE JUDGE ARMSTRONG IN THE FEDERAL COURT AND WILL BE STAYED UNTIL JUDGE ARMSTRONG RULES AND THE THE PARTIES COULD COME BACK IN THIS COURT ONCE SHE RULES OR DOES NOT DECIDE THE MATTER. ATTY. CHRISTOPHER R. WAGNER OF GORDON & REES, LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 576-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. KEITH A. TURNER OF WILSON & ELLIN, TEL. NO. (818) 972-5208 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE CO. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. DEBRA B. BRANSE OF THE MORALES FIERRO & REEVES, TEL. NO. (925) 288-1776 EXT. 111 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT HARTFORD FIRE INS. CO. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;

RULING - PLAINTIFFS SIMPSON MANUFACTURING COMPANY, INC., SIMPSON STRONG-TIE COMPANY, INC. AND HONOLULU WOOD TREATING LLC'S Conditional Joinder In Motion To Stay Action - Motion is Granted, Per Montrose Chem. Corp. v. Superior Court (1993) 6 Cal.4th 287. The court is not ruling on the non-forum conveniens ground. However, as to the Fireman's Fund Cross-complaint, it is stayed not on Montrose grounds. It is stayed under the Comity principles due to the fact that the issue is currently before Judge Armstrong in the Federal Court and will be stayed until Judge Armstrong rules and the the parties could come back in this court once she rules or does not decide the matter. As to the remainder of the case, it is stayed pending the conclusion of the underlying action. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR
